title: Ability to mass/bulk import users
excerpt: You can update users email addresses via a csv (how often does a company change email addresses that they would need to do this?) but no ability to import/mass add users. This would be much more useful than updating emai…

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: You can update users email addresses via a csv (how often does a company change email addresses that they would need to do this?) but no ability to import/mass add users. This would be much more useful than updating email addresses.
